title: The Voice From The Throne
subtitle: The Scroll of One — When He Speaks, I Speak
author: ABASID 1841

verses.text: VERSE 1. When He opens His mouth, I pour light through His words.
VERSE 2. When He li�s His hand, I steady nations beneath His palm.
VERSE 3. When He stands in silence, I write peace upon the wind.
VERSE 4. When He walks the road, I level stones beneath His feet.
VERSE 5. When He sits with the poor, I make the table endless.
VERSE 6. When He forgives, I bend time to heal their memories.
VERSE 7. When He weeps, I gather His tears and water dese�s.
VERSE 8. When He laughs, I loosen chains men called unbreakable.
VERSE 9. When He blesses a child, I sign the future with joy.
VERSE 10. When He corrects, I place honey on the lesson.
VERSE 11. When He enters a house, I breathe new air in its rooms.

VERSE 12. When He li�s His eyes, I answer with sunshine.
When He speaks, I speak.
When He walks, I walk.
When He lives, I live.
For *Me and My Son are One* —
*I AM, ABASID 1841.*
*CYCLE 2 — VERSES 13–24*
VERSE 13. When He sweeps My house, I call it *NDATSVAIRA* and dwell there.
VERSE 14. When He names the le�ers, I crown each sound with *Spirit* .
VERSE 15. When He teaches *Shona* , I return the *Word* to its �rst home.
VERSE 16. When He says “ *Grace* ,” I open the Nile within their hea�s.
VERSE 17. When He says “ *Mercy* ,” I quiet the storms men sta�.
VERSE 18. When He says “ *Truth* ,” I weigh the scales and they balance.
VERSE 19. When He eats with sinners, I make their shame lose its language.
VERSE 20. When He rests at dusk, I keep watch with stars.
VERSE 21. When He steps into wilderness, I tame the jackal of deceit.
VERSE 22. When He calls the sca�ered, I sew the nations edge to edge.

VERSE 23. When He blesses *Zimbabwe* , I kiss the stones of *Great
Zimbabwe* with light.

VERSE 24. When He blesses the world, I widen the sunrise.
When He speaks, I speak.
When He walks, I walk.
When He lives, I live.
For *Me and My Son are One* —
*I AM, ABASID 1841*.
📜
 *THE SCROLL OF ONE — When He Speaks, I Speak*
*(Continuation — Cycles 3 & 4)*
🌞
 *CYCLE 3 — VERSES 25–36*
VERSE 25. When He rises at dawn, I open the east to salute Him.

VERSE 26. When His feet touch dew, I crown each droplet with
remembrance.
VERSE 27. When He looks upon the hills, I whisper ancient songs in the rocks.
VERSE 28. When He smiles upon His people, I so�en their yokes.
VERSE 29. When He breathes, I breathe through every lung.
VERSE 30. When He prays, I weave His words into living �ame.
VERSE 31. When He li�s His sta�, I command winds to obey.
VERSE 32. When He teaches My name, I write it in their bloodlines.
VERSE 33. When He breaks bread, I feed generations unseen.
VERSE 34. When He carries silence, I rest upon His shoulders.
VERSE 35. When He gazes into heaven, I send thunder to answer.

VERSE 36. When He says *“I AM,”* I say, “So it is.”
When He speaks, I speak.
When He walks, I walk.
When He lives, I live.
For *Me and My Son are One* —
*I AM, ABASID 1841.*
🔥
 *CYCLE 4 — VERSES 37–48*
VERSE 37. When He enters the river, I purify the current.
VERSE 38. When He blesses water, I call it *NYU* , the mirror of heaven.
VERSE 39. When He anoints the ea�h, I make it bear twelve fruits.
VERSE 40. When He names the moon, I balance its light with mercy.
VERSE 41. When He raises His eyes to the sun, I reveal Myself as *RA* .
VERSE 42. When He speaks to trees, I make them dance in green tongues.
VERSE 43. When He commands rain, I move clouds like obedient drums.
VERSE 44. When He shouts against injustice, I awaken lions in men’s hea�s.
VERSE 45. When He forgives the wicked, I rewrite their destiny.
VERSE 46. When He declares peace, I silence the thunder’s temper.
VERSE 47. When He says “Return to Me,” I gather the winds and say “Yes.”

VERSE 48. When He li�s the scroll, I open heaven’s door of memory.
When He speaks, I speak.
When He walks, I walk.
When He lives, I live.
For *Me and My Son are One* —
*I AM, ABASID 1841.*
📜
 *THE SCROLL OF ONE — When He Speaks, I Speak*
*(Continuation — Cycles 5 & 6)*
⚡
 *CYCLE 5 — VERSES 49–60*
VERSE 49. When He li�s His face, constellations change their order.
VERSE 50. When He breathes in, galaxies inhale My will.
VERSE 51. When He exhales, newborn stars ignite.
VERSE 52. When He stands still, time kneels before Him.
VERSE 53. When He calls the wind, I give it His voice.
VERSE 54. When He names the rivers, I stretch them toward *Zion* .
VERSE 55. When He calls to the sea, it bows its tides in praise.
VERSE 56. When He raises His hand over mountains, I cause them to listen.
VERSE 57. When He points to the sky, comets remember their path.
VERSE 58. When He whispers, the angels learn silence.
VERSE 59. When He shouts, the trumpets of creation answer.

VERSE 60. When He says “It is good,” I rest in His word.
When He speaks, I speak.
When He walks, I walk.
When He lives, I live.
For *Me and My Son are One* —
*I AM, ABASID 1841.*
🌍
 *CYCLE 6 — VERSES 61–72*
VERSE 61. When He touches dust, I shape new men from its humility.
VERSE 62. When He walks upon sand, I write parables in His footprints.
VERSE 63. When He drinks from the stream, I purify its memory.
VERSE 64. When He blesses the ea�h, I make her womb fe�ile again.
VERSE 65. When He looks at animals, I restore their speech of peace.
VERSE 66. When He strokes the lion’s mane, I calm the hunt in its hea�.
VERSE 67. When He calls the eagle, I strengthen its wings with wisdom.
VERSE 68. When He tends the ca�le, I �ll the grass with grace.
VERSE 69. When He kneels in the �eld, I turn dust to gold.
VERSE 70. When He feeds the hungry, I multiply mercy unseen.
VERSE 71. When He rests beneath the tree, I shade Him with eternity.

VERSE 72. When He sings, I echo through every living thing.
When He speaks, I speak.
When He walks, I walk.
When He lives, I live.
For *Me and My Son are One* —
*I AM, ABASID 1841.*
📜
 *THE SCROLL OF ONE — When He Speaks, I Speak*
*(Continuation — Cycles 7 & 8)*
👑
 *CYCLE 7 — VERSES 73–84*
VERSE 73. When He speaks to kings, I shake their thrones to humility.
VERSE 74. When He smiles upon children, I raise prophets among them.
VERSE 75. When He li�s His eyes to the east, I summon dawn to obey Him.

VERSE 76. When He looks to the west, I so�en the hea�s of those who
forgot Me.
VERSE 77. When He faces no�h, I sca�er false crowns like dry leaves.
VERSE 78. When He turns south, I open *Eden’s gate once more* .
VERSE 79. When He enters a city, I weigh its justice at the gate.
VERSE 80. When He leaves a nation, its idols tremble in silence.
VERSE 81. When He forgives their sins, I tear up the ledger of wrath.
VERSE 82. When He calls them “My brothers,” I call them “My sons.”
VERSE 83. When He opens his arms, I pour Spirit without measure.

VERSE 84. When He says “ *Peace* ,” I engrave it into the bones of the ea�h.
When He speaks, I speak.
When He walks, I walk.
When He lives, I live.
For *Me and My Son are One* —
*I AM, ABASID 1841.*
🕊
 *CYCLE 8 — VERSES 85–96*
VERSE 85. When He prays for the wounded, I carry their pain into light.
VERSE 86. When He touches the broken, I rewrite their breath.
VERSE 87. When He comfo�s the widow, I become her song at dawn.
VERSE 88. When He holds the orphan, I become the father they remember.
VERSE 89. When He visits the prisoner, I break invisible chains.

VERSE 90. When He stands among the outcast, I crown them with gold
unseen.
VERSE 91. When He feeds the stranger, I invite angels to dine.
VERSE 92. When He heals the blind, I open eyes in heaven.
VERSE 93. When He li�s the weary, I restore their forgo�en strength.

VERSE 94. When He speaks *Shona* , I make the tongue of *Eden* speak
again.
VERSE 95. When He says “ *Mwari* ,” I bow within Myself.

VERSE 96. When He whispers “ *Amen* ,” I thunder “Forever.”
When He speaks, I speak.
When He walks, I walk.
When He lives, I live.
For *Me and My Son are One* —
*I AM, ABASID 1841.*
📜
 *THE SCROLL OF ONE — When He Speaks, I Speak*
*(Continuation — Cycles 9 & 10)*
🌌
 *CYCLE 9 — VERSES 97–108*
VERSE 97. When He li�s His voice, eternity pauses to listen.
VERSE 98. When He names the stars, I rename their purposes.
VERSE 99. When He gazes into the void, I �ll it with music.
VERSE 100. When He says “ *Let there be* ,” I complete the sentence.
VERSE 101. When He dreams, I open the book of new worlds.
VERSE 102. When He breathes upon the dust, I shape men with memory.
VERSE 103. When He writes, I engrave His words into the pillars of light.
VERSE 104. When He looks beyond the sky, I open the gate of timelessness.
VERSE 105. When He asks for wisdom, I empty My crown into His spirit.
VERSE 106. When He speaks of mercy, I loosen the cords of judgment.
VERSE 107. When He declares My Name, I multiply its echoes across galaxies.

VERSE 108. When He rests, I rest in the rhythm of His stillness.
When He speaks, I speak.
When He walks, I walk.
When He lives, I live.
For *Me and My Son are One* —
*I AM, ABASID 1841.*
⚖
 *CYCLE 10 — VERSES 109–120*
VERSE 109. When He calls justice, I awaken the throne’s balance.
VERSE 110. When He judges, I reveal truth without cruelty.

VERSE 111. When He extends His hand, I erase the distance between heaven
and ea�h.
VERSE 112. When He breathes on the law, I write it upon living hea�s.
VERSE 113. When He tears the veil, I unveil Myself.
VERSE 114. When He speaks of forgiveness, I pour rivers into dry souls.
VERSE 115. When He li�s His eyes to the poor, I make kings listen.
VERSE 116. When He calls for repentance, I open the gates of dawn.
VERSE 117. When He walks into shadow, I become the torch before Him.
VERSE 118. When He cries “It is done,” I close the book of punishment.
VERSE 119. When He smiles again, I open the book of grace.

VERSE 120. When He says “ *All is well* ,” I call the morning to rise.
When He speaks, I speak.
When He walks, I walk.
When He lives, I live.
For *Me and My Son are One* —
*I AM, ABASID 1841.*
📜
 *THE SCROLL OF ONE — When He Speaks, I Speak*
*(Final Continuation — Cycles 11 & 12 and The Seal of Oneness)*
*CYCLE 11 — VERSES 121–132*
VERSE 121. When He calls *My Name* , I unfold the heavens in reply.
VERSE 122. When He bows, I lower My crown to meet Him.
VERSE 123. When He breathes forgiveness, I erase generations of pain.
VERSE 124. When He stands in silence, I speak through thunderless peace.
VERSE 125. When He li�s His sta�, I awaken sleeping prophets.

VERSE 126. When He turns His face toward *Zion* , I anoint its stones with
remembrance.
VERSE 127. When He li�s His eyes to *Murehwa* , I cause the ground to sing.

VERSE 128. When He remembers *Baba Johani* , I ignite the lamps of
*Grace* .

VERSE 129. When He speaks *Shona* , I smile — for the Word has come
home.
VERSE 130. When He says “ *Return to RA* ,” I open the *Gate of Fire* .
VERSE 131. When He whispers “ *SA RA* ,” I form light into a bride.

VERSE 132. When He says “I and the *Father are One* ,” I echo through
eternity: “ *Yes, we are* .”
When He speaks, I speak.
When He walks, I walk.
When He lives, I live.
For *Me and My Son are One* —
*I AM, ABASID 1841.*
🌞
 *CYCLE 12 — VERSES 133–144*
VERSE 133. When He touches the Nile, I color it gold with grace.

VERSE 134. When He blesses the rains, I call them *GRESISNAIRO — Grace is
Nile.*
VERSE 135. When He sweeps the house, I name it *IMBA YA MWARI.*
VERSE 136. When He says “ *Judgment is done* ,” I whisper “ *Mercy �ows* .”
VERSE 137. When He looks upon the humble, I place crowns upon their dust.
VERSE 138. When He commands the beasts, they remember *Eden* .
VERSE 139. When He breathes into the world, I make time kneel before love.
VERSE 140. When He rests His head, I hold the world still.
VERSE 141. When He opens His eyes again, I say, *“Rise, My Light.”*

VERSE 142. When He ascends, I descend — and all creation stands between
our wings.
VERSE 143. When He says “ *It is �nished* ,” I declare, “ *It has begun.* ”

VERSE 144. For He and I are not two, but One.
🌺
 *THE SEAL OF ONENESS*
I, the *LORD* , have spoken this word from the *Throne* .
I have placed My image in the ea�h, and called Him *ABASID 1841.*
He is the voice of My memory, the echo of My eternity.
His breath is *My Spirit* ;
His hea� is My altar.
Through Him, I am seen.
Through Me, He is known.
Let all creation hear:
When He speaks, I speak.
When He walks, I walk.
When He eats, I bless.
When He rests, I reign.
For the *Father and the Son are One Flame, One Breath, One Crown.*
*I am the Beginning within the Beginning.*
*I am the End within the End.*
*I am He who lives in ABASID 1841.*
And the world shall know:
*The Scroll of One is sealed — forever.*
